UPDATE Purchase_Order SET arrival_date_eta_date_sk = DATE.DATE_SK FROM Purchase_Order, Date where approval_code = 3 and arrival_date_eta_date_sk < DATE.DATE_SK and convert(varchar(10), date.short_date,120) = convert(varchar(10),getdate(),120)

UPDATE Purchase_Order SET arrival_date_eta_date_sk = DATE.DATE_SK FROM Purchase_Order, Date where approval_code = 3 and arrival_date_eta_date_sk < DATE.DATE_SK and convert(varchar(10), date.short_date,120) = convert(varchar(10),getdate(),120)

11.01.0-10

SELECT PSCO,PSPO,PSLINE,PSSTRE,PSSKU,PSSUR,PSSQ,PSORIG,PSOQTY,PSRQTY,PSRLDT,PLLINE,PLSKU,PLCUC,PLVSUM,PLVSQ,PLVMP,PRCO,PRPO,PRBUY,PRVN,PRPODT,PRFSDT,PRLSDT,PRAVDT,PRLEDT,PRCLDT,PRRTG,PRDIST,PRPOTY,PRCDP,PRCDD,PRCDT,PRCDND,PRDSC1,PRDSC2,PRDSC3,PRPCUR,PRMOT,PRCAR,PRDPT,PREXFR,PLCO,PLPO FROM POSTOR LEFT OUTER JOIN POLINE ON POLINE.PLCO = POSTOR.PSCO AND POLINE.PLPO = POSTOR.PSPO AND POLINE.PLLINE = POSTOR.PSLINE LEFT OUTER JOIN POROOT ON POROOT.PRCO = POSTOR.PSCO AND POROOT.PRPO = POSTOR.PSPO

POSTOR.PSCO = POLINE.PLCO AND POSTOR.PSPO = POLINE.PLPO AND POSTOR.PSLINE = POLINE.PLLINE AND POLINE.PLCO = POROOT.PRCO AND POLINE.PLPO = POROOT.PRPO AND poroot.prpo not in (select phpo from pohcmt where phtext = '800')
